1.project-description: A re-creation of my old roblox game "Merge Boxes!", this time made in Love2D! This project is still actively being worked on, and is unfinished. (First created December 13, 2025)

2.project-description: One of my first popular roblox games, It got over a million visits across all of it's places while it was up. I have taken it down, since I no longer wish to associate with it. If you think I'm bluffing, you can DM/Email me for proof. Why exactly did I take it down? VERY long story, I don't mind explaining though, ask away! (First created June 18, 2023)

3.project-description: This game was kind of a flop, but I had a LOT of fun making it back then, which is why it is getting a remake! (First created December 29, 2023)

4.project-description: ..it's my website. You don't need to read about this, you're here! (First created February 11, 2025)
